meta.notes: Single base camp throughout. All days are loops from Canyon Lodge.

locations_visited.name: Mammoth Hot Springs
locations_visited.note: Optional 20-30 min stop only — NOT a main activity

locations_visited.name: Lamar Valley
locations_visited.note: Core wildlife viewing — 3 hrs unbroken, 6:30 AM departure required

locations_visited.name: Tower Fall
locations_visited.note: Quick stop on the way back, ~20 min detour

locations_visited.name: Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone
locations_visited.note: Artist Point + Lower Falls — morning start, avoid midday crowds

locations_visited.name: Hayden Valley
locations_visited.note: Evening ONLY — 6:00-8:00 PM for golden-hour wildlife. High ROI.

locations_visited.name: Old Faithful
locations_visited.note: Arrive 8:30 AM to beat crowds. Check eruption timing in advance.

locations_visited.name: Grand Prismatic Spring (overlook)
locations_visited.note: Do the overlook trail — not just the boardwalk below

locations_visited.name: Biscuit Basin / Fountain Paint Pot
locations_visited.note: Only if energy allows — do not force it

locations_visited.name: Norris Geyser Basin
locations_visited.note: Unique geology. World's largest active geyser field. Not a quick stop.

locations_visited.name: Yellowstone Lake
locations_visited.note: Afternoon wind-down. Low effort, high value. 4:15-5:30 PM.

locations_notably_excluded.name: Mud Volcano
locations_notably_excluded.reason: Close to Canyon but skipped — fatigue management

locations_notably_excluded.name: West Thumb Geyser Basin
locations_notably_excluded.reason: Too far south given base camp logistics

locations_notably_excluded.name: Artist Paint Pots
locations_notably_excluded.reason: Near Norris but not included — keeping Day 4 light

locations_notably_excluded.name: Beartooth Highway
locations_notably_excluded.reason: Out of scope for this route

days.title: Arrival — Bozeman to Canyon
days.theme: Travel day. Do not plan sightseeing.

rows.notes: Get rental car fast
Grab snacks before leaving

rows.activity: Drive to Canyon via North Entrance
rows.notes: Includes buffers and traffic
Optional 20-30 min stop — do not commit to more
Do not push. Recovery begins now.

day_principles: Arrival day is a travel day. One optional stop maximum.
Afternoon fatigue from travel is real. Plan nothing demanding.
Evening must be free.

days.title: Lamar Valley — Wildlife Focus
days.theme: Northeast corridor. Early start mandatory. Afternoon rest non-negotiable.

rows.notes: Earlier = better wildlife sightings
Scenic drive — watch for pullouts
Core experience. Do not rush this. Bison, wolves, bears possible.
Quick stop on return — do not over-extend
CRITICAL RECOVERY — do not schedule anything here
Keep it light. Canyon rim walk acceptable.

day_principles: Wildlife is only worth seeing in the first 3 hours of daylight. Do not schedule wildlife for midday.
Lamar Valley requires 2-3 hours minimum to be worthwhile. A 30-min slot is useless.
Mandatory afternoon rest after a 6:30 AM start. This is not optional.
Tower Fall is secondary — include only on the way back, never as a destination.

days.title: Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone + Hayden Sunset
days.theme: Canyon in the morning, rest midday, Hayden Valley at golden hour.

rows.notes: Artist Point + Lower Falls. Both viewpoints required.
Add immersion — North Rim trail or Uncle Tom's Trail
Avoid peak midday crowds. Deliberate recovery window.
Golden hour timing — do not leave later
HIGH ROI. Bison herds, possible grizzly, golden light. This is why you stay at Canyon.

day_principles: Hayden Valley MUST be visited at golden hour (6-8 PM). Midday Hayden is flat and crowded — not worth it.
Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone requires BOTH Artist Point and Lower Falls to be complete.
Midday is for rest, not activities. Crowds are heaviest 11 AM - 3 PM.
Day 2 is the easiest day — the human intentionally chose this for recovery.

days.title: Geyser Loop — Old Faithful + Grand Prismatic
days.theme: Full-day southwest commitment. 3-hr round trip drive. Beat the crowds.

rows.notes: Beat crowds — Old Faithful fills up fast

rows.activity: Drive south to Upper Geyser Basin

rows.notes: Check eruption timing before arriving. Aim to arrive 20 min before scheduled eruption.
Take the overlook trail — the elevated view is 10x better than the boardwalk

rows.activity: Optional: Biscuit Basin or Fountain Paint Pot
rows.notes: Only if energy allows — do not force it
Old Faithful Inn dining room or pack lunch
Needed — this is the highest-drive day

day_principles: Old Faithful area is 1.5 hrs from Canyon each way — this is a full-day commitment, not a morning trip.
Grand Prismatic overlook trail is non-negotiable — the boardwalk view is obstructed. Always include the overlook.
Biscuit/Fountain are optional buffers — do not schedule them as required stops.
Evening must be free — driving + geysers is exhausting.

days.title: Norris Geyser Basin + Yellowstone Lake — Balanced Day
days.theme: Two short loops. Deliberately light. Pack evening.

rows.notes: Slightly relaxed start — earned it
Unique geology — world's hottest and most dynamic geyser basin. Not a quick stop.
Low effort, high value. No hiking required. Just be there.
Last night — departure tomorrow morning

day_principles: Day 4 is intentionally light — the human is managing cumulative fatigue.
Norris requires 1.5-2 hrs minimum to explore properly.
Yellowstone Lake is a wind-down activity, not a hiking destination.
Last evening must include time to pack — do not schedule dinner far from lodge.

days.title: Exit — Canyon to Bozeman

rows.notes: Do not cut it close — buffer is critical
Wildlife on roads, construction possible, no rushing
Safe margin maintained

day_principles: Departure day is NOT a half-day sightseeing opportunity. Do not suggest 'one last stop'.
Yellowstone roads can delay 30+ minutes unpredictably (bison jams, construction). Buffer is essential.
Departure must be timed at minimum 2.5 hrs before flight when driving from Canyon.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Canyon Lodge for all 5 nights. Never moves. Every day is a loop. This eliminates packing stress, lost time, and reservation chaos. Our AI planner has no concept of base camp logistics — it may suggest moving lodging, which would be wrong for Yellowstone.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our planner does not ask about or optimize for lodging strategy. This should be a key input.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Every single day (except Day 5) has an explicit rest/nap block. Day 1 labels it 'Critical recovery.' The human understands that a 6:30 AM wildlife start + 3 hrs outdoor activity means you are done by noon. Our AI schedules activities all day.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our itinerary prompt says 'max 4-5 experiences per day' but does not require rest blocks. We should explicitly build in a 1.5-2 hr afternoon rest on any day that starts before 8 AM.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Lamar Valley is a 6:30 AM departure. Hayden Valley is specifically saved for 6-8 PM sunset. Neither was scheduled at 10 AM or 2 PM. The human knows that wildlife activity and crowd density are time-dependent in ways the AI doesn't model.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our prompt says nothing about time-of-day optimization for wildlife. We should add guidance: wildlife experiences should be scheduled at dawn or dusk, never midday.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Canyon to Old Faithful is listed as 1.5 hrs. Canyon to Lamar Valley is 1hr15min. Canyon to Bozeman is 2-2.5 hrs with buffer. Every drive estimate includes traffic and wildlife stop buffers. Yellowstone has a 45 mph speed limit and frequent bison jams.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our travel rows likely underestimate Yellowstone drive times significantly. Google Maps times are misleading in the park. Our prompt should note that Yellowstone internal drives should add 25-50% buffer over map estimates.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Mammoth Hot Springs — one of Yellowstone's most famous features — is a drive-by. No Mud Volcano (0.5 miles from Canyon Lodge). No West Thumb. The human had clear prioritization and said no to famous things in service of the overall arc.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our AI likely includes everything it knows about Yellowstone. The eval agent should check whether we are over-scheduling famous attractions at the cost of pacing.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: Day 5 is drive + car return + flight. Nothing else. The human did not try to squeeze in a 'last morning at Norris.' Our planner will almost certainly suggest activities on departure morning.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our prompt says 'last day must wrap 2 hours before departure_time.' But we should enforce zero sightseeing on departure days with early flights.

key_principles_the_human_applied.description: The human specifically notes 'Do overlook trail' for Grand Prismatic. The standard boardwalk is at ground level and you cannot see the colors. The overlook trail (0.8 miles) is the only way to see the spring properly. This is expert-level local knowledge.
key_principles_the_human_applied.ai_gap: Our tip for Grand Prismatic may not distinguish between boardwalk and overlook. This is exactly the kind of local tip our tip-enhancement pass should produce.

coverage_check.scoring: If any 'must_include' location is absent from the board, that is a board generation failure.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: Lamar Valley scheduled before 8 AM. Hayden Valley scheduled after 5 PM. No wildlife activity scheduled 10 AM - 4 PM.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: Wildlife viewing scheduled at 10 AM or later on Day 1.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: At least one rest/free block per day on days with 4+ activities or early starts.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: Activities scheduled continuously from 7 AM to 7 PM with no break.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: Canyon to Old Faithful allows 1.5 hrs. Canyon to Lamar allows 1.25 hrs. Departure day allows 2.5 hrs to Bozeman.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: 30-minute drive times for routes that are 45+ minutes in the park.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: Each day stays in one geographic zone. Northeast, Southwest, and Canyon-area days are separate.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: Lamar Valley and Old Faithful on the same day (opposite ends of the park, 3+ hrs apart).

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: 2-3 headline experiences per day max. Arrival and departure days have 0-1.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: 5+ experiences on Day 1 or any day with a 6 AM start.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: Tip mentions overlook trail, not just boardwalk.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: Tip only mentions boardwalk or misses the viewing angle issue.

itinerary_scoring_dimensions.pass_criteria: Last day contains only drive and airport logistics.
itinerary_scoring_dimensions.fail_signal: Any sightseeing activity scheduled on departure morning.
